    Analysis Modules
    Active Modules: 17 / 17
    Toggle modules on or off for the next analysis run. Click the edit icon to access its specific configuration page.
    StatusModuleDescriptionActions
    TCA Scorecardv2.1Central evaluation across fundamental categories.
    Risk Assessmentv1.8Risk analysis across 14 domains.
    Benchmark Comparisonv1.5Performance vs. sector averages.
    Macro Trend Analysisv1.2PESTEL analysis and trend scores.
    Gap Analysisv2.0Identify performance gaps.
    Growth Classificationv3.1Predict growth potential.
    Founder Fit Analysisv1.0Investor matching & readiness.
    Team Assessmentv1.4Analyze founder and team strength.
    Strategic Fit Matrixv1.1Align with strategic pathways.
    Financial Analysisv1.0Revenue model, burn rate, and financial health.
    Economic Analysisv1.0Market size, pricing, and economic viability.
    Social Impact Analysisv1.0ESG factors and social impact metrics.
    Marketing Analysisv1.0GTM strategy, brand positioning, and channels.
    Environmental Analysisv1.0Environmental compliance and sustainability.
    Funder Fit Analysisv1.0Investor alignment and funding readiness.
    Strategic Analysisv1.0Competitive positioning and strategic roadmap.
    Analyst Reviewv1.0Manual analyst input, NLP analysis, and AI deviation review.
